section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES - Periodic Transaction Report
free_text:
# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES

Periodic Transaction Report

Name: Rohit Khanna
Office telephone: 202-225-2631

Status: Member of the U.S. House of Representatives checked. State: CA. District: 17. Officer or Employee unchecked. Employing Office blank.

Initial Public Offering question: No checked; Yes unchecked.

Report type: Initial Report checked; Amendment unchecked. Date of Report Being Amended blank.

Official use stamp: LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER; 2026 MAY 11 AM 11:31; Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives.

Transaction grid contains the pre-printed example row and the instruction "Please see the attached". No real transaction rows appear on this cover page.

uncertainties.note: Read from cover stamp; OCR also produced AMII:31 but image reads AM 11:31.
